info.name: QlockCare API
info.description:
End-to-end manual + automated testing for the QlockCare backend.

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection + `environments/Local.postman_environment.json` into Postman.
2. Seed a test user: `uv run python scripts/seed_test_user.py`.
3. Start the API: `uv run uvicorn src.main:app --port 8001`.
4. Open `auth > Login` and click Send. Tokens auto-populate into the env.
5. Click into any folder — every request is auto-authenticated.

**Folders are organized by user role:**
- `auth`, `health` — public.
- `staff`, `patients`, `appointments`, `visits`, `locations`, `audit-logs`, `notifications > broadcast` — AGENCY_ADMIN.
- `agencies` — SUPER_ADMIN only.
- `notifications > list/read/badge` — any authenticated user.
- `portal` — PATIENT role only.

**CI:** the same collection runs under Newman on every PR. See `.github/workflows/api-smoke.yml`.

item.name: auth
item.description: Authentication, OTP verification, password reset. Public endpoints (no Bearer required).

item.name: staff
item.description: Care staff profiles, qualifications, and availability slots. Requires AGENCY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.

item.name: patients
item.description: Patient profiles, standalone guardians, and patient-guardian relationships. Requires AGENCY_ADMIN.

item.name: appointments
item.description: Care appointments — scheduling, state machine, service items, patient-side actions.

item.name: visits
item.description: Field visits by care staff — check-in/out, notes, patient verification, issue reporting.

item.name: portal
item.description: Patient-facing endpoints. Run 'auth > Login as PATIENT' first (after seeding via scripts/seed_test_user.py) — the request path will 403 with AGENCY_ADMIN.

item.name: notifications
item.description: Per-user notifications, badge counts, broadcast (admin-only), and channel preferences.

item.name: locations
item.description: Agency locations — used as visit/appointment venues.

item.name: audit-logs
item.description: Append-only audit trail. Filter by actor / resource / time range. Requires SUPER_ADMIN.

item.name: agencies
item.description: Agency-tenant management (SUPER_ADMIN only). Create / list / patch / soft-delete agencies, and list the programs each agency offers. Auto-extracts `agency_id` from the Create response for use by the downstream Get/Patch/Delete/Programs requests.

item.name: health
item.description: Kubernetes-style liveness/readiness probes. Public, no auth.
